required_preferences.fact: Schedules more frequent video chats with his brother's family, including daytime sessions on weekends to help his nieces stay connected while their father travels

supersedes.fact: Schedules all family video chats with his brother after 8pm CST to accommodate both families' routines

required_preferences.fact: Brings his phone into the bedroom at night to monitor CPAP device app and sleep data as required by his doctor

supersedes.fact: Keeps his phone charging overnight in the home office — never brings devices into the bedroom

required_preferences.fact: Pays bills online every Saturday morning — never misses this routine even during vacations
Attends mandatory weekly nutritionist sessions every Thursday afternoon and prepares a printed meal log for review — never misses an appointment or log submission
Logs shoulder pain intensity and mobility progress daily into a dedicated rehab tracking journal
Prioritizes child drop-offs if his wife needs to accompany her mother during medical appointments or rehabilitation sessions; flexible with schedule through the recovery period

persona: A senior DevOps engineer managing cloud infrastructure for a healthcare company
